# With spice.submit.label.addWhen=create
# configured labels are applied only while creating CRs,
# but labels passed with --label are still applied to updates.

as 'Test User <test@example.com>'
at '2026-05-12T19:20:00Z'

cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

shamhub init
shamhub register alice
shamhub new origin alice/example.git
git push origin main

env SHAMHUB_USERNAME=alice
gs auth login

# Create the CR before configured labels exist.
git add feature.txt
gs branch create feature -m 'Add feature'
gs branch submit --fill

# Configured labels should not be added when updating the existing CR,
# but an explicit --label should still be honored.
git config spice.submit.label skip-ci
git config spice.submit.label.addWhen create

cp $WORK/extra/feature-modified.txt feature.txt
git add -u
gs commit create -m 'Modify feature'
gs branch submit --fill --label manual

shamhub dump change 1
cmpenvJSON stdout $WORK/golden/change.json

-- repo/feature.txt --
feature
-- extra/feature-modified.txt --
feature modified
-- golden/change.json --
{
  "number": 1,
  "state": "open",
  "title": "Add feature",
  "body": "",
  "html_url": "$SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/change/1",
  "head": {
    "repository": {"owner": "alice", "name": "example"},
    "ref": "feature",
    "sha": "408c570b7ae47c3c24f4d89b1448f1bf47439775"
  },
  "base": {
    "repository": {"owner": "alice", "name": "example"},
    "ref": "main",
    "sha": "b19c3d5a962be08d0385bf5a7f049cd84c334e21"
  },
  "labels": ["manual"]
}
